analysis_result: 33 of 33 cutaneous neurofibromas (100%) cluster together in Cutaneous NF_G6 (n=12) + Cutaneous NF_G7 (n=21); no non-Cutaneous_NF samples in G6/G7.
discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Reported (33/33 = 100%) and model (33/33 = 100%) results are identical. Both denominator (N=33 Cutaneous_NF) and numerator (33 clustering together) match exactly. Relative difference = 0%, well within the +/-10% concordance threshold. Model's additional detail (breakdown into G6 n=12 and G7 n=21) is consistent with paper's description of cutaneous NF methylation subclades.
